message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first shutdown snapshot capture (tick 288)

Migrates the final-shutdown snapshot capture path in `ft watch`
shutdown sequence (main.rs L15699-15703) to cx-first:

- `wez.list_panes()` → `list_panes_with_cx(&shutdown_snap_cx)`
- `engine.shutdown_checkpoint(&panes, Duration::from_secs(5))` →
  `shutdown_checkpoint_with_cx(&shutdown_snap_cx, &panes, Duration::from_secs(5))`

Both share the `shutdown_snap_cx` binding resolved at the top of the
shutdown-checkpoint block.

`shutdown_checkpoint_with_cx` (snapshot_engine.rs L1339) wraps the
capture + mark_shutdown sequence in a `timeout_with_cx(cx, timeout, ...)`
so both the outer 5s budget AND cx-cancel propagate into the underlying
storage writes. Previously the shutdown snapshot could still run for
the full 5s even if cx-cancel had fired.

This is the last ambient snapshot engine call site in production main.rs
(tick 273 migrated `capture` → `capture_with_cx` for the runtime +
CLI entry points).

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 102 (187-288).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 187 sites (185 before + 2).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 47 (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
